name: @kontourai/console
description: Kontour Console local hub: fixture inspection, projections, SSE, and the Flow run bridge.

scripts.build: npm --workspace @kontourai/console-core run build && npm --workspace @kontourai/console run build && npm --workspace @kontourai/console-ui run build
scripts.test: npm run typecheck && node --import tsx scripts/check-content-boundary.ts && npm --workspace @kontourai/console-core test && npm --workspace @kontourai/console test && npm --workspace @kontourai/console-ui test && npm --workspace @kontourai/console-ui run typecheck && npm run test:dev-local && npm run test:browser
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && npm --workspace @kontourai/console-core run typecheck && npm --workspace @kontourai/console run typecheck && npm --workspace @kontourai/console-ui run typecheck
